pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-011 (Data Governance/Knowledge) scores 0.428 composite (highest: NICE at 0.428) and is edge_case for the Data Engineer role. The KSA is an edge case for Data Governance but contains 0 DE pattern signals sufficient to warrant inclusion for a senior IC data engineer. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NICE signal (0.428), and Data Governance handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance (DG) — specifically implementation vs. ownership — for Data Engineer roles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Engineers implement governance processes (metadata tagging, lineage capture, catalog population, quality rule enforcement) — present in 25-40% of senior DE postings. Governance ownership (policy authoring, stewardship programs) belongs to governance-specific roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. DG content signals ownership rather than implementation. Market evidence supports exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. DG content signals ownership rather than implementation. Market evidence supports exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
